title: Easy Seahorse Coloring Page
seoTitle: Free Easy Seahorse Coloring Page (Printable PDF)
seoDescription: Download and print this simple kids seahorse coloring page. Perfect for young children and toddlers. Free high-res PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The Seahorse lacks a stomach and teeth, meaning it must eat almost constantly to stay alive, consuming up to 3,000 tiny shrimp a day.
Seahorses are unique fish that swim vertically, using a small dorsal fin to propel forward and pectoral fins to steer.
